willbender.label: Willbender (Radiant Swordbender)
willbender.kill_window: After Aegis consumed + movement skills on CD
key_threats: Heaven's Palm → Rushing Justice → Flash Combo

dont_hit.response: Pop with throwaway hit before committing burst
Count to 3, burst immediately. Rooted.

willbender.notes: Mobile melee burst. Very fast for a guardian. Saves with Aegis, Renewed Focus, Flowing Resolve (moving heal).

firebrand_heal.label: Firebrand (Heal)
firebrand_heal.kill_window: Don't focus them — kill their DPS first

dont_hit.response: Pop with throwaway hit before committing burst
Count to 3, burst immediately. Rooted.

firebrand_heal.notes: Heals, aegis pulses, stability, tomes. Strip Aegis from anyone near them before engaging.

firebrand_dps.label: Firebrand (DPS)
firebrand_dps.kill_window: Squishy without support tomes — valid kill target

dont_hit.response: Pop with throwaway hit before committing burst
Count to 3, burst immediately. Rooted.

firebrand_dps.notes: Tome burst damage. Squishy without support tomes. Valid kill target.

luminary.label: Luminary (Radiant GS)
key_threats: Binding Blade tether → pull → Whirling Wrath

dont_hit.response: Pop with throwaway hit before committing burst
Count to 3, burst immediately. Rooted.

luminary.notes: Greatsword with radiant effects. GS pull combo is deadly. Symbols on ground buff them and damage you.

dragonhunter.label: Dragonhunter

dont_hit.response: Pop with throwaway hit before committing burst
Count to 3, burst immediately. Rooted.

dragonhunter.notes: Longbow traps. Telegraphed but high damage. Dodge the traps (blue circles on ground).

conduit_condi.label: Conduit (Condi Mallyx)
key_threats: Torment stacks (damages on move AND stand still)
conduit_condi.notes: Torment stacks punish both movement and standing still. Don't stay in melee long. Strip Resistance with boon strip. Better as +1 than 1v1.

conduit_pwr.label: Conduit (Power Shiro)
conduit_pwr.kill_window: After Jade Wind on CD + Impossible Odds energy drained
conduit_pwr.notes: Fast, aggressive. Dodge Jade Wind (AoE stun). Save stunbreak for Jade Wind. Steal interrupts Impossible Odds. Outrotate, don't force 1v1.

herald.label: Herald
herald.notes: Facet boons (might, protection, etc.). Boon-heavy — strip before engaging anyone near them.

renegade.label: Renegade (Bunker)
renegade.notes: Point holder. Kalla summons on ground. Staff 5 block + knockback. Don't 1v1 — decap and leave.

paragon_dps.label: Paragon (DPS Spear)
paragon_dps.kill_window: Between chant activations when motivation is low
key_threats: Golden wings = max motivation = max danger

dont_hit.response: Stop attacking. Wait 3-4 seconds. Resume when glow fades.
Apply conditions if possible, otherwise wait it out.

paragon_dps.notes: Spear burst + chant might stacking. Golden wings = max motivation = max danger. Steal interrupts chant activation. Better as +1. Tanky (heavy armor + warrior HP).

paragon_supp.label: Paragon (Staff Support)
paragon_supp.kill_window: Don't focus them — kill whoever is away from them

dont_hit.response: Stop attacking. Wait 3-4 seconds. Resume when glow fades.
Apply conditions if possible, otherwise wait it out.

paragon_supp.notes: Staff heals + chant pulses. Glued to DPS player. Don't focus them — kill whoever is away from them. Battle Standard (elite) = ranged rez/stomp, disengage if banner drops.

berserker_condi.label: Berserker (Condi)

dont_hit.response: Stop attacking. Wait 3-4 seconds. They heal from your damage.
Apply conditions if possible, otherwise wait it out.

berserker_condi.notes: Torch burning, berserk mode Primal Bursts. After Endure Pain expires = burst window.

berserker_pwr.label: Berserker (Power)
berserker_pwr.kill_window: After Headbutt stun + burst skills on CD

dont_hit.response: Stop attacking. Wait 3-4 seconds. Resume when glow fades.
Apply conditions if possible, otherwise wait it out.

berserker_pwr.notes: Short burst trades. Headbutt stun → burst. Don't extend fights.

spellbreaker.label: Spellbreaker
spellbreaker.kill_window: After Full Counter is spent + boon strip on CD

dont_hit.response: Bait with auto attack. Do NOT commit burst skills into it.
Stop attacking. Wait 3-4 seconds. Resume when glow fades.
Apply conditions if possible, otherwise wait it out.

spellbreaker.notes: Full Counter blocks then dazes. Bait Full Counter with auto, don't commit. Has boon strip of their own.

holosmith.label: Holosmith
holosmith.kill_window: After Photon Forge mode ends (weak outside forge)

dont_hit.response: Do not use ranged attacks. Melee or wait.

holosmith.notes: Massive burst in Photon Forge, weak outside it. Shield 4 reflects projectiles. Disengage during forge, re-engage after. Emergency Elixir passive heal at 25%.

scrapper_supp.label: Scrapper (Support)
scrapper_supp.kill_window: Low kill priority — decap and rotate
scrapper_supp.notes: Tanky, gyro heals. Low kill priority. Decap and rotate.

scrapper_dps.label: Scrapper (DPS)
scrapper_dps.notes: Hammer CC chains. Dodge the big swings.

mechanist.label: Mechanist (Alac)
mechanist.kill_window: Focus the player, not the mech
mechanist.notes: Annoying mech pet. Focus the player, not the mech.

amalgam.label: Amalgam (Condi Spear)
amalgam.notes: Newer spec. Ranged condition pressure. Gap close when possible.

soulbeast_pwr.label: Soulbeast (Power/Stancebeast)
soulbeast_pwr.kill_window: Between big skills (Maul, Worldly Impact on CD)
soulbeast_pwr.notes: Merged with pet (no visible pet). Greatsword Maul = big overhead, dodge it. Worldly Impact leap = dodge. Between big skills = your window.

soulbeast_condi.label: Soulbeast (Condi/Poisonbeast)
soulbeast_condi.kill_window: After One Wolf Pack expires — medium armor, killable with burst
soulbeast_condi.notes: Merged, condi pressure. One Wolf Pack = all strikes double-hit — dodge during their burst. Medium armor, killable with burst.

galeshot.label: Galeshot
galeshot.notes: Wind-themed. Pet + ranged pressure. Gap close aggressively — longbow rangers hate melee. Dodge Point Blank Shot (knockback).

druid.label: Druid
key_threats: CC chains from pet + nature skills
druid.notes: Celestial Avatar = healing mode. Wait for CA to end, then burst. CC chains from pet + nature skills. Save stunbreaks.

daredevil.label: Daredevil
daredevil.kill_window: After dodge endurance depleted + Flanking Strike evade spent
daredevil.notes: S/D or D/P. Fast rotation, +1 specialist. Flanking Strike evade frame. Mirror matchup = skill diff.

specter_supp.label: Specter (Support)
specter_supp.kill_window: Don't chase — they sustain through Shadow Shroud
specter_supp.notes: Shadow Shroud heals allies. Scepter tether. Don't chase — they sustain through Shadow Shroud.

deadeye.label: Deadeye
deadeye.kill_window: Close distance aggressively when in kneel mode (rooted)
key_threats: Deadeye's Mark (bonus damage on marked target)
deadeye.notes: Rifle sniper or pistol/dagger. Kneel mode = high damage but rooted — close distance aggressively to punish. Deadeye's Mark: they mark a target, gaining bonus damage on all attacks against that player. If you get marked, you know you're their focus. Shadowstep (or any teleport) beyond 1500 range breaks the mark. Watch for the mark icon on your bar.

antiquary.label: Antiquary
antiquary.notes: Newer spec. Treat cautiously until patterns learned.

evoker.label: Evoker (Condi D/D Toad)
evoker.kill_window: After Hare's Agility blur expires + NOT in Earth attunement
key_threats: Incidental AoE hits through stealth and evades

dont_hit.response: Disengage entirely. Re-engage after ~5 seconds. They can still cast while invulnerable.
STOP ATTACKING in Earth attunement. Wait for them to swap attunements, THEN burst.
Invulnerable but rooted. Reposition for advantage, wait 4 seconds.
Pop both charges with throwaway hits before committing burst.

evoker.notes: Melee condi. Toad F5 daze (no animation, instant). Double Arcane Shield charges.

tempest_heal.label: Tempest (Aurashare Support)
tempest_heal.kill_window: Don't focus — isolate their DPS instead

dont_hit.response: Avoid melee contact with aura-buffed targets. Strip the aura or wait ~4 seconds.

tempest_heal.notes: Staff AoE heals + aura sharing. Shocking Aura = YOU get stunned for hitting aura-buffed targets. Overload Water = big AoE heal. Don't focus, isolate their DPS instead.

tempest_dps.label: Tempest (DPS)
tempest_dps.notes: Overload damage. Squishier without support build sustain.

weaver.label: Weaver
weaver.kill_window: Priority kill target when caught — very squishy
weaver.notes: Dual-attunement combos. Very squishy, very high damage. Priority kill target when caught.

virtuoso.label: Virtuoso
key_threats: Blade burst (all blades thrown at once)

dont_hit.response: Wait ~1 second, then burst. Very short duration.

virtuoso.notes: Psychic blades (NO clones). Blade burst = all blades thrown at once. Kill target when blades are spent.

mirage.label: Mirage

dont_hit.response: Wait ~1 second, then burst. Very short duration.

mirage.notes: Dodge creates ambush attacks (afterimage). Dodge doesn't move them — they're still where they were. Confusion stacks = slow down YOUR skill usage. Consume Plasma from Steal = best stolen skill.

chronomancer.label: Chronomancer
chronomancer.kill_window: After shatter (no clones left) = weakest moment

dont_hit.response: Wait ~1 second, then burst. Very short duration.

chronomancer.notes: Shatters need clones. After shatter = weakest moment (no clones). Continuum Split = time-rewind, interrupt with Steal. Distortion (F4) = brief invuln.

troubadour.label: Troubadour (Support)

dont_hit.response: Wait ~1 second, then burst. Very short duration.

troubadour.notes: Bardic heals. Slippery (Blink, Distortion, clones). Don't chase.

reaper.label: Reaper
reaper.kill_window: After Reaper Shroud drops — burst real HP bar

dont_hit.response: Drain shroud first with poke damage, then burst when shroud drops. Do NOT try to burst through it — it's a second health bar.

reaper.notes: Double health bar (real HP + shroud HP). Gravedigger spammable below 50% HP. They are SLOW — kite when needed. Do NOT try to burst through shroud.

scourge_supp.label: Scourge (Support)
scourge_supp.kill_window: No shroud = squishier than Reaper in 1v1
scourge_supp.notes: Sand shades on ground (dark circles). No shroud = squishier than Reaper 1v1. Don't cleave in shade fields. Stay out of shade radius.

scourge_dps.label: Scourge (DPS)
scourge_dps.kill_window: Between shade cooldowns — spread out when conditioned
scourge_dps.notes: Condition AoE pressure. Epidemic copies conditions to nearby players — spread out when conditioned.

harbinger.label: Harbinger
harbinger.kill_window: When Blight stacks are high (self-damage reduces their HP)

ritualist.label: Ritualist
ritualist.kill_window: Kill or avoid spirits — same core necro weakness: slow, no mobility
ritualist.notes: Spirits + weapon enchants. Newer spec. Kill or avoid spirits. Same core necro weakness: slow, no mobility.
